hero.title: LAST WAR ALLIANCE PAGE
hero.subtitle: Professional website templates exclusively for Last War: Survival Game alliances
hero.slogan: "Build a professional, organized, and powerful image for your alliance."
hero.warning: This is a demo of multi-language support and alliance management features. Want a site like this for your alliance?

points.title: Scoring
points.desc: Automated score management system, helping members easily track daily/weekly goals.

shield.title: Base Protection
shield.desc: Clear shield-up rules for events like Enemy Buster to prevent military losses.

base.title: Base Layout
base.desc: Guide members on optimal base positioning for cross-server battles.

online.title: Activity
online.desc: Track member online status to ensure forces are always ready for battle.

attack.title: Tactics
attack.desc: Rules for attacking, truck hijacking, and coordination in secret missions.

registration.title: Registration & Approval
registration.desc: Intuitive registration system for Desert Storm, prioritized by power and activity.

penalty_main.title: Main Squad Penalties
penalty_main.desc: Transparent penalty rules for unexcused absences during battles.

penalty_sub.title: Reserve Mode
penalty_sub.desc: Flexible reserve rotation mechanism, allowing all members to grow together.

safety_points.title: Safety Points
safety_points.desc: Set safety point milestones for each round to secure alliance rankings.

spirit.title: Team Spirit
spirit.desc: Encourage experience sharing and mutual support throughout the game journey.

banned.title: Blacklist
banned.note: System to publicly list violations of alliance rules
